question: Chapters
feedback: The introduction does not enumerate the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only presents a problem statement and motivation, so the reader cannot identify the subsequent parts of the work.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of what each section will cover. The text merely outlines the problem and constraints, lacking a concise overview of the contents of the individual chapters.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not evident from this passage. Without a roadmap or outline, a reader cannot understand how the argument will progress or how the sections are organized.
